nasb.text: Therefore now, O Lord, please take my life from me, for death is better to me than life.”

esv.text: Therefore now, O Lord, please take my life from me, for it is better for me to die than to live.”

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！現在求你取去我的性命吧，因為我死了比活著還好。”

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，求你收回我的性命吧，我死了比活着还好！”

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，现在就求你取走我的性命吧！因为我死了比活着更好。”
